name: Claude Schimper
background: Mr. Schimper was appointed Executive Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer on July 1, 2022. He was previously Executive Vice-President, Russia and West Africa Operations. He joined Kinross in 2010 and has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

company_affiliations.name: Kinross Gold Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer
